creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
(In reply to Matthew Seaman from comment #6)

Hi Matthew, thanks for dealing with this so quickly, and for patiently fixing my stupid school-boy errors.

I stupidly forgot about security/Makefile and as for ACME_VERSION, whilst I didn't know about that, seeing as I based my Makefile off the one for py-certbot-dns-sakuracloud, I have no idea how I managed to remove that line without noticing.

Cheers for your patience!

Jamie
